TO RELEASE $867.30 TO THE JUDGMT CREDITOR IN ORDER TO FULLY SATISFY THE JUDGMT. $867.30 IS CALCULATED AS FOLLOWS: $748. REMAINING ON JUDGMT + $190.30.
